title: A Top U.S. Commander Dismisses Reports of Civilian Deaths in Iran
summary_full: Adm. Brad Cooper said a strike on an Iranian school may have been the only civilian casualty incident of the war.
summary_public: Adm. Brad Cooper said a strike on an Iranian school may have been the only civilian casualty incident of the war.

IR.label: neutral
